title: Officer Digital Imaging
company: French Medical Institute for Mothers and Children
description:
About French Medical Institute for Mothers and Children
The FMIC is a not-for-profit hospital in Kabul, dedicated to providing world-class medical services. In contrary to what its name implies, FMIC is not only a hospital for mothers and children but a general hospital. It offers high quality healthcare services to all age groups including infants, children, adolescents, and adults.
The hospital is run through an innovative four-way partnership between the Government of Afghanistan, the Government of France, the Aga Khan Development Network and the French NGO, La Chaîne de l’Espoir, with Aga Khan University managing FMIC on behalf of AKDN.​
Since opening in 2006, FMIC has transformed the lives of many families by providing high quality healthcare to children throughout Afghanistan. The hospital’s exceptional medical services rank among the best in the region.
FMIC’s Patient Welfare Programme ensures these services are available to the people who need them most, regardless of age, heritage, gender, or income.
FMIC’s innovative eHealth programmes increase access to quality healthcare in remote regions.
FMIC is becoming a referral centre for hospitals throughout the region.
FMIC is investing in the future of Afghanistan’s healthcare system by providing medical professionals with international standard training and professional development.
Since it opened, FMIC has served over 2 million patients, trained over 4,000 medical professionals, and currently employs over 95 percent Afghan staff.
FMIC plans to grow from a 176-bed facility to a 550-bed teaching hospital that offers a full complement of tertiary specialized services, trains new healthcare providers, and supports a substantial research programme. The Expanded Medical Complex, currently under design, will begin to offer services in the near future. The new facilities will provide space for research activities, additional Postgraduate Medical Education programmes and enhanced diagnostic facilities, and medical services, including adult general surgery, cardiology, gastroenterology, internal medicine, neurosciences, oncology, orthopaedics, and renal diseases.​

Job Description
Responsible for preparing, scanning, indexing, and uploading patient records, as well as retrieving files from storage and departmental locations to ensure timely access and continuity of patient care.

Job Requirements
Regular Responsibilities
Oversee the preparation process of key medical record documents.
Review scanned documents to ensure accuracy and completeness.
Ensure the overall quality and integrity of medical records.
Identify errors or discrepancies in medical records, resolve issues, and ensure timely uploading to the HIMS portal.
Detect and correct errors in both scanned and prepped medical records.
Maintain high-quality scanned images while meeting the productivity target of 400 medical records per day with high accuracy.
Establish and monitor productivity (400 files/day) and accuracy standards for document preparation.
Ensure medical records are readily accessible to healthcare providers to support timely patient care.
Retrieve files from storage based on inactive file lists to support the document imaging process.
Prepare files according to the key document checklist.
Perform daily scanning of prepared files.
Index scanned files in the system by creating batches using Visit IDs for both inpatient and outpatient encounters to enable efficient retrieval.
Upload scanned files to the server to ensure availability and continuity of patient care.
Retrieve files from inactive storage areas as required to support ongoing operations.
Perform any other related duties assigned by the supervisor.
Periodic Responsibilities
Transfer inactive files to the scanning area as needed to optimize space in active filing areas.
Ensure medical records are scanned efficiently to enhance accessibility at the point of care.

Submission Guidelines
Dear applicant,
To apply for this vacancy, please use the following link:
https://forms.gle/sx4gQJDTkW4Vpkrq6
If the link above does not work by clicking on it, please copy and paste it in the browser address bar.
Make sure to press submit at the end of the application.
Please note:
You are allowed to apply only before the closing date.
Before submitting your resume, make sure that it has specific details about your qualifications and experience, including the dates.
Only short-listed candidates whose applications respond to the criteria will be contacted.
If you are not invited for a written test or interview within a four-week period of time, please consider that your application was not considered for this vacancy.
Validated copies of academic certificates/diplomas will be requested only if you are selected.
Best regards,
FMIC HR Team

طبق پالیسی شرکت، این شرکت در برابر هر نوع نقض قوانین رفتاری/محافظتی که توسط کارمندان، مشاوران، داوطلبان، ارائه دهنده گان خدمات، فروشنده گان، سرمایه گذاران فرعی/شرکا، شرکت های وابسته و سایر شرکا صورت میگیرد، تحمل صفری دارد

جمع آوری به موقع حق الاشتراک انترنت از مشترکین (حقیقی و حقوقی)؛ کاهش بدهی های پولی؛ ثبت دقیق پرداخت ها و مدیریت روابط با مشتریان در زمینه مالی در مطابقت با پالیسی های شرکت.
بررسی حسابات ؛ نظارت بر سیستم های مالی و حسابداری برای شناسایی مشترکینی که زمان پرداخت پول آن ها فرا رسیده یا گذشته است
تماس با مشترکین؛ تماس تیلفونی؛ ارسال ایمیل؛ پیام یا بازدید حضوری از مشترکین دارای بدهی پولی جهت یادآوری و دریافت پول
مذاکره برای پرداخت؛ گفتگو با مشتریان جهت تعیین تکلیف حساب ها؛ تنظیم اقساط یا نهایی کردن پرداخت های معوق
ثبت و راپوردهی؛ ثبت تمام تعاملات با مشتریان؛ تاریخ تماس ها و تعهدات پرداخت در دیتابیس شرکت
قطع خدمات؛ قطع کردن انترنت مشترکینی که پس از اخطار های مکرر از پرداخت حق الاشتراک خودداری کرده اند
حل منازعات مالی؛ بررسی اختلاف نظر های مالی بین شرکت و مشترک در مورد میزان بدهی و تلاش برای حل آن
جمع آوری نقدی؛ مراجعه حضوری به اماکن مشترکین تجاری/خانگی برای جمع آوری پول نقد یا چک و تحویل آن به خزانه شرکت
ارائه گزارش روزانه؛ هفتوار و ماهوار از وضعیت مجموع پول های جمع آوری شده به مدیر مالی یا مدیر فروشات

دانش خوب از شیوه های ایمنی معیاری مالی؛ حسابداری و کنترول مالیات
توانایی نظارت بر پروسه مالی

title: مسؤل مالی
description:
About Western ISP & ICT Solutions
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن فعالیت های خویش را در جنوری ۲۰۱۶ به‌عنوان یک شرکت ارائه‌دهنده خدمات انترنتی آغاز کرد. در سال ۲۰۱۷، این شرکت تیمی را برای مدیریت کسب‌وکار آی اس پی تشکیل داد و با شرکت‌های پیشرو آی اس پی و جی اس ام در افغانستان را همکاری نمود
این شرکت روی بخش آی اس پی شرکت سرمایه‌گذاری کرده و در مدت کوتاهی زیربنای لازم را برای فعالیت به‌عنوان یک شرکت آی اس پی مستقل ایجاد نموده و در ماه می ۲۰۲۲ جواز آی اس پی خود را از وزارت مخابرات و تکنالوژی معلوماتی – اداره تنظیم خدمات مخابراتی افغانستان (اترا) دریافت کرد
شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن تمرکز خود را بر ارائه خدمات انترنتی با کیفیت بالا و هزینه مناسب در سراسر افغانستان معطوف نموده است
این شرکت با سرعت قابل توجهی در حال توسعه بوده و با کمک افراد متخصص و با تجربه به فعالیت خود ادامه میدهد. هدف شرکت وسترن ارائه راه ‌حل ‌ها و خدمات انترنتی برای تمام بخش‌ ها و سکتورهای افغانستان می‌باشد

Job Description
تطبیق اصول / مقررات
تطبیق اصول/مقررات به روش شرکت ( معیارات ما برای عملکرد مسلکی) مسؤلیت مشترک همه جوانب ذیدخل جهت اجرای ماموریت شرکت خدمات انترنتی وسترن است. ما باید همیشه روش شرکت و ( اصول/مقررات) محافظتی را رعایت کنیم
طبق پالیسی شرکت، این شرکت در برابر هر نوع نقض قوانین رفتاری/محافظتی که توسط کارمندان، مشاوران، داوطلبان، ارائه دهنده گان خدمات، فروشنده گان، سرمایه گذاران فرعی/شرکا، شرکت های وابسته و سایر شرکا صورت میگیرد، تحمل صفری دارد
هدف اصلی این بست کاری : مدیر مالی مسئول رهبری، مدیریت، کنترول و انکشاف تمام امور مالی، حسابداری، بودیجوی، سرمایه‌ گذاری، امور خزانه، گزارش‌ دهی مالی و تطبیق معیار های مسلکی و بین‌ المللی می‌ باشد تا پایداری مالی، شفافیت، رشد پایدار و تصمیم‌ گیری ستراتیژیک شرکت تضمین گردد

title: Internal Audit Officer (IT)
description:
Role Summary
The incumbent of this position will help the organization by protecting its internal controls and data within its technology system. He/She will safeguard sensitive information by identifying weaknesses in the system’s network and creating strategies to prevent any security breaches in the technology.

Duties and Responsibilities
Assist the Internal Audit team in developing the drafted annual Internal Audit plan.
Support the Internal Audit team in developing and implementing the evolving Internal Audit methodology for AWCC.
Review external IT Audit and inspection reports and ensure that all recommendations in them have been followed.
Create a solid information technology infrastructure and collaborate with clients to devise and put in place policies and procedures regarding network security issues.
Perform information system control reviews including system development standards, operating procedures, system security, communication controls, backup and disaster recovery, and system maintenance.
Assist in IT audit, IT risk management, and IT compliance activities.
Conduct all assigned audits including planning, evaluating, and documenting the results, report, and follow-up in accordance with the audit plan.
Assume responsibility as team leader for special audit assignments and submit evaluation results on assigned audits to the Internal Audit Manager.
Identify the weaknesses in systems, network, or database levels of information systems and provide recommendations to prevent security breaches in the information system based on technical assessments.
Propose practical and value-added recommendations to address/control weaknesses and/or process inefficiencies.
Check and monitor all servers, applications, printers, scanners, copiers, computer systems, user privileges, helpdesk services, and all related systems relevant to the System Admin section. (System Administration)
Monitor the recording of all cameras and sound systems, hard drives, DVR’s, sound systems, and all systems related to the CCTV section.
Develop & maintain effective and professional working relationships with all levels of staff within the company.
Assist the Internal Audit Manager in the preparation of a concise and informative audit report to effectively communicate the findings and recommendations to the Department and senior management.
Organize & reference work papers for review by Audit Manager.
Follow up on audit findings to ensure that the related section has taken corrective action against noted internal Audit department findings.
Other responsibilities assigned by the Internal Audit Manager.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in computer science, a Master's degree is preferable. (CCNA certificate is an asset)
Good knowledge of telecommunication laws, rules, and regulations.
At least 2-3 years of related experience in the Audit & IT Department.
Fluent communication skills (written and verbal) in local languages as well as English.
Professional training or certificates in IT & Audit-related fields are a plus.
Understanding of multiple technology domains, including software development, Windows, Database Management, and Networking.
Capable of working independently and with minimal supervision.
Able to travel to all provinces of Afghanistan.
Outstanding interpersonal and communication skills; ability to communicate effectively with technical and non-technical audiences.
Expert knowledge of internal auditing, internal controls, and risk management.
Comprehensive understanding of internal control environments within the IT function.
Excellent leadership and teamwork skills.
Proactive, hands-on, results-driven orientation required.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should fill out and submit the APPLICATION FORM with complete and correct information. To have access to the APPLICATION FORM, please copy and paste the link into your Web Browser.
https://forms.gle/zZAeCxpi9oAfLJTq6

title: IT Technician
description:
Role Summary
The IT Technician is responsible for managing the installation and troubleshooting of Wireless, Microwave, and VSAT links. The role includes resolving issues related to LAN network devices and addressing computer-related problems for customers through in-person support, phone consultations, or remote assistance. Additionally, the IT Technician provides technical support regarding computer operating systems, software applications, email configuration, installation processes, printing solutions, and the maintenance of customer LAN networks.

Duties and Responsibilities
Perform installation, activation, and troubleshooting of wireless links in accordance with company guidelines.
Execute the installation, activation, and troubleshooting of microwave links following established protocols.
Conduct installation, activation, and troubleshooting of VSAT links while adhering to company policies.
Install and configure LAN network devices to meet customer requirements effectively.
Troubleshoot LAN network devices and provide the best solution in case of second option availability.
Conduct surveys for network projects, arrange requirements, and implement solutions as needed.
DVR camera wiring, installation, and configuring based on the requirement.
UAT wireless base stations maintenance and resolving 1st level base station issues (in cooperation with Head Office)
Installing Wire and Wireless equipment at UA wireless base stations and ensuring 100% functionality upon completion.
Integrating technical solutions successfully done on-site and sharing it with other team members for future use.
Detailed daily and weekly reports to under-assigned manager.

Job Requirements
Bachelor’s degree/Diploma in Computer Science and/ or relevant field.
A minimum of 3 years of experience in network installation and troubleshooting or a relevant field.
Relevant certifications (e.g., Cisco CCNA, MCITP, or equivalent) will be considered an advantage.
Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to communicate technical information effectively.
Full understanding and speaking of Dari, Pashto, and English.
Ability to ride a motorcycle and be comfortable using it when required for work-related tasks
Competencies (in order of importance)
Dependability — The job requires being reliable, responsible, dependable, and fulfilling obligations.
Attention to Detail — The job requires being careful about detail and thorough in completing work tasks.
Cooperation — The job requires being pleasant with others on the job and displaying a good-natured, cooperative attitude.
Analytical Thinking — The job requires analyzing information and using logic to address work-related issues and problems.
Integrity — The job requires being honest and ethical.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by June 10, 2026 . To apply, please send your cover letter along with an updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af . Please ensure the position title and vacancy number are included in the subject line of your email.

title: System Administrator
description:
Role Summary
The System Administrator is responsible for the end-to-end management and security of the ISP’s core network infrastructures, including firewalls, routers, switches, and servers across multiple sites. This role supports customers by ensuring stable internet connectivity and reliable service through precise configuration, continuous monitoring, and rapid incident resolution. It also ensures maximum network uptime and peak performance across the infrastructure. Key responsibilities include managing link provisioning, bandwidth allocation, IP address management, and collaboration with upstream providers.

Duties and Responsibilities
Network Infrastructure & Security
· Install, configure, and maintain core routers, switches, and firewalls, ensuring scalability and adaptability to future growth.
· Oversee the operation and firmware updates of primary and secondary firewalls across Main Office and Provincial sites, ensuring optimal performance and security.
· Monitor spanning tree protocols on switches, ensuring data flows through primary point-to-point links and addressing any issues.
· Protect CPE and PTP devices from external network attacks by blocking unauthorized ports and ensuring secure network access.
· Identify customer bandwidth over-usage through weekly monitoring via Cacti servers, apply traffic shaping on CPE devices if limiters fail, and ensure no customer exceeds their contracted bandwidth.
2. Link & Bandwidth Management
· Process link activations, upgrades, downgrades, and suspensions through CRM and coordination with the collections department, ensuring seamless integration with core firewall systems.
· Administer the firewall system dedicated to hotspot users, generating new accounts and allocating bandwidth based on user requirements.
· Record customers’ day and night bandwidth usage and update the records daily; monitor to prevent overload during peak hours, and request bandwidth upgrades for the main office and branches as needed.
· Manage firewall time schedulers for day and night bandwidth allocations, optimizing network usage.
· Oversee demo internet link connections, ensuring customer satisfaction during trial periods.
· Administer customer requests for temporary bandwidth upgrades, ensuring seamless service delivery.
3. Server & System Maintenance
· Conduct monthly HDD diagnostics on the primary server, ensuring data security and system health.
· Maintain and update the Primary and Secondary Cacti servers to ensure better functionality and apply available updates.
· Monitor UCRM server health and apply updates as they become available.
· Monitor NTP server health, specifically for PTP, CPE, and the bandwidth scheduler.
· Maintain EMCO server IP addresses and register new PTP and PTMP links for the alerting system in case of downtime.
4. IP & Device Management
· Update IP allocation sheets for Main office and provincial branches, including devices license keys.
· Monitor the locations of high-capacity devices and their connected base stations.
· Maintain records of customers and sites’ equipment serial numbers for asset record.
5. Monitoring & Troubleshooting
· Identify and resolve WAN, LAN, and WLAN issues promptly to maintain network stability.
· Utilize Intermapper to assess microwave device capacities, ensuring no device is overloaded.
· Update and monitor the WLAN virtualized Layer 2 map for new sector and switch installations, ensuring all PTP devices operate above 10 Mbps LAN speed by actively monitoring the alerting system.
· Oversee the number of tickets created and closed by System/Helpdesk officers, ensuring timely and satisfactory resolution of technical issues.
6. Customer Support & Collaboration
· Collaborate quarterly with the collections department to reconcile active customer bandwidth allocations, including day and night usage.
· Provide online support to team members and customers for any technical-related issues, ensuring prompt resolution.
· Upstream Coordination: Serve as the primary liaison with upstream providers to diagnose and resolve link issues promptly, staying engaged until full resolution to ensure uninterrupted service.
7. Compliance & Web Filtering
· Continuously monitor web filter subnets and liaise with upstream providers to block URLs flagged by ATRA, ensuring permanent enforcement in full compliance with its official directives.
8. Additional Duties
· Perform any other tasks as assigned by management to support network operations and service delivery.

Job Requirements
Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field. Preference will be given to candidates with a Master’s degree in a related major field.
With a Bachelor’s degree: minimum of 5 years’ experience in system or network administration; with a Master’s degree: minimum of 3 years, preferably within an ISP environment.
CCNA and CCNP certifications are highly preferred.
Strong hands-on experience with Cisco, MikroTik, and Ubiquiti (UBQT) devices.
Advanced knowledge of network protocols, including TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and PPPoE.
Deep understanding of network security best practices and compliance with regulatory directives (e.g., ATRA).
Ability to analyze and resolve complex technical issues efficiently under pressure.
Excellent communication and reporting skills in Dari, Pashto, and English.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by Jun 10, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-SA-2152-J - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

title: تاپیست زبان فارسی و پشتو

تنظیم و صفحه‌آرایی ابتدایی اسناد مطابق فورمت تعیین‌شده بخش.
بازبینی متن تایپ‌شده جهت جلوگیری از اشتباهات تایپی.
ثبت و ذخیره‌سازی منظم فایل‌ها در سیستم آرشیف دیجیتالی.
همکاری با نویسندگان و محققان جهت اصلاح و اعمال تغییرات در متن‌ها.
حفظ محرمانه‌بودن اسناد و معلومات حساس.
آماده‌سازی نسخه نهایی فایل‌ها برای چاپ یا ارسال به بخش ویرایش.

مهارت کامل در تایپ به زبان‌های مورد نیاز مجتمع.
حداقل یک سال تجربه کاری در امور تایپی یا اداری (ترجیحاً).
آشنایی با برنامه‌های مایکروسافت آفیس به‌ویژه Word و Excel.
دقت بالا در تایپ و توجه به جزئیات متن.

About AKHS-A (Aga Khan Health Services-Afghanistan)
Aga Khan Health Services (AKHS) is one of the most comprehensive private, not‐for‐profit health care systems in the developing world with community health programs in large geographical areas in Central and South Asia, as well as in East Africa.
Aga Khan Health Services (AKHS) is one of the most comprehensive private, not‐for‐profit health care systems in the developing world with community health programs in large geographical areas in Central and South Asia, as well as in East Africa.
The Aga Khan Health Services, Afghanistan (AKHS, A) was established in 2003 as part of the Aga Khan Development Network (AKDN). AKHS, A provides health care services mainly on behalf of the government including the Ministry of Public Health’s of Afghanistan’s Basic Package of Health Services (BPHS) and Essential Package of Hospital Services (EPHS). AKHS, A is unique both in scale and scope, delivering critical health services along the continuum of care, from Community Health Workers (CHWs) to ISO certified hospital facilities.
The Aga Khan Health Services, Afghanistan (AKHS, A) was established in 2003 as part of the Aga Khan Development Network (AKDN). AKHS, A provides health care services mainly on behalf of the government including the Ministry of Public Health’s of Afghanistan’s Basic Package of Health Services (BPHS) and Essential Package of Hospital Services (EPHS). AKHS, A is unique both in scale and scope, delivering critical health services along the continuum of care, from Community Health Workers (CHWs) to ISO certified hospital facilities.
AKHS, A is currently implementing healthcare services in Bamyan, Baghlan, Badakhshan, Kabul and Takhar provinces. The agency’s scope of work includes the provision of primary and secondary healthcare, preventive and curative medical care, Nursing and Midwifery education, Human Resources Development and Hospital Management. As BPHS and EPHS implementer, AKHS, A provides technical support as well as capacity building of health personnel, immunization services, nutrition trainings and the training of Community Health Nurses and Community Health Midwives.
AKHS, A is currently implementing healthcare services in Bamyan, Baghlan, Badakhshan, Kabul and Takhar provinces. The agency’s scope of work includes the provision of primary and secondary healthcare, preventive and curative medical care, Nursing and Midwifery education, Human Resources Development and Hospital Management. As BPHS and EPHS implementer, AKHS, A provides technical support as well as capacity building of health personnel, immunization services, nutrition trainings and the training of Community Health Nurses and Community Health Midwives.
AKHS, A draws on internal and other donor fundings to continue supplementary and complementary support to the national health system. Moreover, AKHS, A has introduced innovations, including, expansions of e-Health services, e-learning initiatives, and cross border arrangements. To promote healthy environment, AKHS, A is also implementing net zero and greenhouse gas emission initiatives.

title: استاد کادر دیپارتمنت انجنیری نرم افزار
description:
Role Summary
پوهنتون کاتب استاد کادر دیپارتمنت انجنیری نرم افزار استخدام می‌کند.

Duties and Responsibilities
الف- رعایت نمودن مقررات و طرزالعمل های پوهنتون
ب- تعهد به حضور و وقت شناسی
ج- ارائه گزارش ماهوار، سمستروار و سالانه به رئیس پوهنحی با فرمت تعیین شده از سوی ریاست پوهنحی
د- تهیه تمامی مواد درسی مورد نیاز مضامین مربوط جهت تدریس
ه- تهیه رهنمود دروس عملی و کار ساحوی (در صورت موجودیت)
و- تهیه پلان عملیاتی انفرادی مطابق معیارهای آکادمیک
ز- تهیه کورس پالیسی و ارائه آن در ابتدای هر سمستر به محصلین و پوهنحی
ح- پیشبرد منظم دروس نظری و عملی مطابق تقسیم اوقات ارائه شده از سوی پوهنحی
ط- انجام حضور و غیاب محصلین و ثبت آن در کتاب حاضری در هر جلسه درسی
ی- ارزیابی محصلین مربوط، در طول سمستر و ختم آن مطابق به مقررات پوهنتون
ک- راهنمایی محصلین در امور آموزشی به عنوان استاد راهنما بر اساس هدایت پوهنحی
ل- راهنمایی محصلین در تهیه مونوگراف به عنوان استاد راهنما و یا مشاور
م- ارزیابی آثار و کنفرانس های علمی استادان و داوری مونوگراف و مقالات محصلین
ن- اشتراک فعال و سهم گیری در محافل علمی پوهنحی و پوهنتون
س- اشتراک در برنامه های آموزشی جهت ارتقای ظرفیت استادان
ع- التزام به حضور در کمیته ها، مجالس و شوراهای مربوط، در پوهنحی و پوهنتون و انجام مسئولیت های محوله
ف- سهم گیری مسئولانه در بهبود امور پوهنحی و پوهنتون به منظور توسعه علمی، آموزشی
ص- تلاش برای ارتقای سویه علمی خویش و کسب مهارت های کاری در ارتباط با وظیفه
ق- ترجمه و یا تألیف کتب درسی، کتب ممد درسی، مقالات و کمک به پیشبرد تحقیقات علمی پوهنتون
ر- اشتراک فعال و منظم در برگزاری امتحانات پوهنتون و انجام مسئولیت های سپرده شده
ش- حفظ اسرار و جلوگیری از انتقال داشته های مادی و معنوی پوهنتون به افراد و نهادهای دیگر بدون کسب اجازه از مقامات ذیربط
ت- سهم گیری در امور جامعه و کمک به انکشاف آن

پوهنتون کاتب استاد کادر دیپارتمنت تکنالوژی معلوماتی استخدام می‌کند.

Duties and Responsibilities
الف- رعایت نمودن مقررات و طرزالعمل های پوهنتون
ب- تعهد به حضور و وقت شناسی
ج- ارائه گزارش ماهوار، سمستروار و سالانه به رئیس پوهنحی با فرمت تعیین شده از سوی ریاست پوهنحی
د- تهیه تمامی مواد درسی مورد نیاز مضامین مربوط جهت تدریس
ه- تهیه رهنمود دروس عملی و کار ساحوی (در صورت موجودیت)
و- تهیه پلان عملیاتی انفرادی مطابق معیارهای آکادمیک
ز- تهیه کورس پالیسی و ارائه آن در ابتدای هر سمستر به محصلین و پوهنحی

ط- انجام حضور و غیاب محصلین و ثبت آن در کتاب حاضری در هر جلسه درسی

ق- ترجمه و یا تألیف کتب درسی، کتب ممد درسی، مقالات و کمک به پیشبرد تحقیقات علمی پوهنتون

About Faradata Social Change and Women Empowerment Organization (FSCWEO)
Faradata Social Change and Women Empowerment Organization (FSCWEO) is a non-governmental, non-profit organization established on 20 July 2020 in Afghanistan. FSCWEO works to promote social change, empower women and youth, and support vulnerable communities through programs in education, health, WASH, livelihoods, human rights, and humanitarian assistance. With active offices in Kandahar, Herat, Helmand, Farah, Daikundi, Nangarhar and Nimruz, the organization aims to build an Afghanistan where all people—regardless of gender, ethnicity, or religion—live in dignity and equality.

title: Data Science Trainer
description:
Role Summary
NETLINKS is delivering a market-responsive digital skills program for Afghan adolescents and youth (ages 15–24) across Kabul and Herat. We are seeking an experienced Data Science Trainer to deliver Track B, which equips learners with the full "data-to-decision" pipeline and prepares them for real employment through the Jobs.af marketplace.
This is hands-on, applied teaching. Our model is "Applied Digital Mastery" — every concept is reinforced through real-world projects, not just lectures. You will work in small cohorts (low 25:1 student-to-instructor ratio) using a blended delivery format (two in-person sessions plus one online session weekly).

Duties and Responsibilities
Key Responsibilities
Deliver the Data Science & Information Management curriculum, covering data cleaning, SQL and database management, and building interactive dashboards using industry-standard visualization tools.
Teach the complete "data-to-decision" pipeline through live demonstrations, guided practice, and project-based assignments.
Design and grade practical projects that build a job-ready portfolio for each learner.
Conduct competency-based pre/post assessments and maintain accurate records in the Learning Management System (LMS).
Provide personalized mentorship to support learners at risk of falling behind, using LMS analytics to flag and intervene early.
Support learners' transition into internships, freelance work, and jobs, including CV workshops and onboarding to the Jobs.af Freelancer Marketplace.
Deliver content in a way that integrates with the program's mandatory life-skills module.
Maintain a safe, inclusive, and supportive learning environment at all times.
Comply fully with the project's safeguarding (SEA/SH), child protection, and data protection standards.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Information Systems, or a related field.
Demonstrated practical proficiency in: data cleaning and preparation, SQL and relational database management, and data visualization / dashboard tools (e.g., Power BI, Tableau, or similar).
Prior teaching, training, or facilitation experience, ideally with youth or adult learners.
Strong communication skills and the ability to explain technical concepts clearly to beginners.
Fluency in Dari and/or Pashto; working knowledge of English is an advantage.
Preferred / Desirable
Experience in a project-based or bootcamp-style teaching environment.
Familiarity with LMS platforms and blended (in-person + online) delivery.
Experience preparing learners for freelance or remote work opportunities.
Programming exposure (e.g., Python for data analysis) is a plus.
Important Notes
All staff must sign and adhere to a Code of Conduct, complete SEA/SH and safeguarding training before entering a classroom, and pass background checks.
Employment terms comply with Afghan labour law and international standards, including fair wages, reasonable working hours, and occupational health and safety provisions.

Submission Guidelines
Interested and qualified candidates are invited to submit through the Jobs.af ATS system under the designated vacancy section for this position.
Equal Opportunity and Safeguarding Statement
NETLINKS Ltd. is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity, inclusion, and merit-based recruitment. Qualified candidates of both genders are encouraged to apply, and female candidates are highly encouraged to submit their applications.
NETLINKS maintains a zero-tolerance policy for sexual exploitation, abuse, and harassment (SEA/SH), child abuse, and any form of discrimination. The successful candidate will be required to sign and uphold the NETLINKS Code of Conduct, complete mandatory PSEA/SH and safeguarding training, and consent to background and reference checks.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis until the position is filled.

description:
About Verfied Digital Solutions
Verified Digital Solutions is a Canadian company specializing in accountability, transparency, and digital monitoring solutions for humanitarian and development programs. Verify is a program of Verified Digital Solutions, operating as an independent monitoring and verification platform that supports NGOs, donors, and implementing partners across Afghanistan and other complex environments. Through a combination of digital technology and trained field professionals, Verify confirms that reported activities, services, and aid distributions are delivered as planned and reach intended beneficiaries, strengthening accountability, improving data quality, and reducing the risk of misreporting, fraud, and aid diversion.
Website: verifieddigital.solutions

Job Description
Verify – a Canadian independent monitoring, verification, and transparency platform – is seeking qualified Field Verification Officers to conduct independent field monitoring of donor-funded and NGO-implemented projects across Afghanistan. Verification Officers will travel to project sites, engage with communities, collect evidence, and submit structured reports through Verify's secure digital system. This is a project-based consultancy; officers are assigned to missions based on geographic coverage and project needs.
Key Responsibilities:
Conduct field visits to project sites, including clinics, schools, food distribution points, infrastructure works, and community programs
Verify that reported activities, services, and distributions have taken place as planned
Interview beneficiaries, project staff, and community representatives using structured questionnaires
Collect geo-tagged photographs, GPS data, and monitoring forms using a smartphone
Submit accurate and timely reports through Verify's digital platform
Identify and report discrepancies, risks, or irregularities in project implementation
Maintain strict confidentiality, neutrality, and professional ethics at all times
Reporting and Supervision: Field Verification Officers work under the supervision of the Verify Monitoring Team. Assignments, tools, and reporting templates are provided through the Verify digital platform.
Compensation: Officers are compensated per completed and approved assignment. Payments are made via bank transfer following verification of submitted work.
Ethics and Compliance: All officers must comply with Verify's Code of Conduct, confidentiality policies, and data protection standards. Any falsification, misrepresentation, or conflict of interest will result in immediate contract termination.

Job Requirements
Job Requirements: All of the following requirements must be met:
Minimum three (3) years of professional experience in Monitoring and Evaluation, third-party monitoring, field verification, or humanitarian project monitoring
Fluency in English, Pashto, and Dari — spoken and written
Strong computer skills, including use of email, online forms, and digital reporting systems
Ability to use a smartphone for data collection, GPS tracking, and photo documentation
Ability to travel within assigned provinces and districts
High level of integrity, accuracy, and attention to detail
Preferred: Experience working with NGOs, international organizations, or donor-funded programs is strongly preferred.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates should submit the following to the email address below:
Full name
Current province and district
Phone number
Languages spoken
Summary of Monitoring and Evaluation experience
Updated CV / Resume
Two professional references (name, organization, and contact number)
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Submission Email
careers@verifieddigital.solutions

description:
About ACBAR
The Agency Coordinating Body for Afghan Relief and Development, ACBAR, is an independent forum founded in 1988 in response to the demand from NGOs working with Afghan refugees in Pakistan and across the border in Afghanistan to more efficiently coordinate assistance and delivery of services. With its main office in Kabul since 2002, ACBAR brings together 230 National and International NGOs working in in all sectors of humanitarian assistance and development in Afghanistan. Its activities focus heavily on information to its members and the aid community in general, coordination of activities at the national and regional levels, and advocacy on issues affecting the work of its members in Afghanistan. ACBAR has a mission to provide an efficient platform for members to carry out effective humanitarian, development, and peace building activities in Afghanistan. The members are the drive behind ACBAR, and their active participation is essential to ACBAR’s continued dynamism.

title: Sharia Audit Officer
description:
Role Summary
The Sharia Audit Officer is responsible for conducting periodic Sharia audits across the bank to ensure all products, services, contracts, transactions, and operational processes fully comply with Islamic Sharia principles and the rulings of the Sharia Supervisory Board. The role helps preserve the bank’s Islamic integrity and strengthens governance.

Duties and Responsibilities
1. Sharia Audit Planning & Execution
Participate in preparing the annual Sharia Audit Plan based on risk assessment.
Conduct field audits in branches and departments to verify adherence to Sharia guidelines.
Examine financing files, contracts, documentation, and transaction flows for Sharia compliance.
Test samples of Murabaha, Ijara, Musharaka, Mudaraba, and deposit transactions against Sharia standards.
2. Review of Contracts, Policies & Procedures
Audit the implementation of Sharia-approved product structures and documentation.
Ensure operational procedures match the product manuals approved by the Sharia Supervisory Board (SSB).
Check whether staff are following required Sharia workflows (e.g., asset ownership, agency structures, disclosures, penalties handling).
3. Identification of Sharia Non-Compliance
Identify Sharia violations, deviations, or gaps during audits.
Discuss findings with relevant departments and agree on corrective actions.
Ensure non-compliance events are recorded, reported, and resolved within the required timeframe.
4. Reporting & Documentation
Prepare clear Sharia audit reports with observations, recommendations, and compliance ratings.
Submit audit results to the Head of Sharia Audit and contribute to reports for the Sharia Supervisory Board.
Maintain proper documentation of all audit working papers and evidence.
5. Follow-Up & Corrective Actions
Follow up on previously reported Sharia findings to verify whether corrective actions were implemented.
Work with business units, risk management, operations, and compliance teams to close audit issues.
6. Coordination & Support
Coordinate with Internal Audit and Compliance Department for combined risk reviews.
Provide Sharia guidance to departments during audits to improve their understanding and performance.
7. Capacity Building & Awareness
Support the development of Sharia audit tools, checklists, and audit methodologies.
Assist in internal awareness sessions on Sharia compliance requirements for staff.
8. Continuous Improvement
Stay updated on AAOIFI Sharia standards, new fatwas, and industry best practices.
. Recommend improvements to Sharia audit processes and internal controls

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor’s degree in Islamic Studies, Sharia, Islamic Finance, Accounting, or Business Administration.
Professional certification in Islamic finance or Sharia audit (preferred).
1–3 years of experience in Islamic banking, Sharia audit, internal audit, or compliance roles.
Familiarity with AAOIFI standards and Islamic banking products.
Skills & Competencies
Strong understanding of Islamic banking and Sharia principles.
Ability to analyze financial transactions and documentation.
Good report writing skills with clarity and accuracy.
Strong attention to detail and analytical mindset.
Excellent communication and coordination abilities.
High integrity, objectivity, and professionalism.

Submission Guidelines
Applicants who meet the above requirements should submit their updated Curriculum vitae (CV)/Resume to (sr.recruitment-officer@ghazanfarbank.com)
Please Mention specific Job Title in subject of your E-mail otherwise your Email will not be considered.
Note: only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further recruitment process.

title: Manager - BI & Analytics
description:
Role Summary
The Manager – BI & Analytics leads BI, reporting, and analytics for the marketing division, enabling data-driven decisions across revenue and customer initiatives.
The role focuses on developing BI strategies, creating dashboards and automated reports, and delivering insights through advanced analytics such as customer segmentation, churn analysis, and campaign evaluation.
It also ensures data accuracy, governance, and continuous improvement of BI tools, while collaborating with cross-functional teams and building a strong analytics team.

Duties and Responsibilities
The Manager – BI & Analytics role will be accountable to achieve the following objectives:
• Lead the Business Intelligence, reporting, and advanced analytics function for the marketing division, establishing standards, methodologies, and best practices for all BI activities.
• Develop and execute BI strategies aligned with commercial, customer, and revenue growth objectives, ensuring analytics initiatives directly support business priorities.
• Oversee daily, weekly, and monthly reporting on revenue, recharge, subscriber behavior, product performance, and market trends, ensuring timely and accurate delivery to stakeholders.
• Design and manage executive dashboards, automated reporting systems, and performance scorecards that provide actionable insights to senior leadership.
• Drive customer segmentation, customer lifetime value (CLV) analysis, churn analysis, and campaign effectiveness measurement to optimize marketing ROI and customer retention.
• Provide strategic insights to support product development, pricing strategies, and customer acquisition initiatives.
• Lead predictive analytics initiatives for forecasting revenue, customer trends, and market opportunities, enabling proactive business planning.
• Ensure data governance, reporting accuracy, and integrity across all BI systems, establishing quality controls and validation processes.
• Collaborate with Marketing, Sales, Finance, IT, and Networks teams for integrated decision support, breaking down silos and enabling cross-functional analytics.
• Manage and mentor BI analysts, reporting specialists, and data teams, fostering professional development and building analytical capabilities.
• Support senior leadership with strategic recommendations based on data-driven insights, translating complex data into clear business narratives.
• Monitor competitor performance, market intelligence, and regulatory reporting requirements, ensuring compliance and competitive awareness.
• Continuously improve BI tools, automation capabilities, and analytical methodologies, driving efficiency and innovation in reporting and analytics.
Key Deliverables:
• Executive Dashboards and Performance Scorecards
• Revenue and Customer Analytics Reports
• Predictive Analytics Models and Forecasts
• Campaign Effectiveness and ROI Analysis
• Data Governance Framework and Quality Standards
• Strategic Recommendations to Senior Leadership
• Automated Reporting Systems and BI Tool Enhancements

Job Requirements
Education:
• Bachelor’s degree in data science, Business Analytics, Statistics, Computer Science, Information Systems, or related quantitative field.
• Professional certification in Business Intelligence (e.g., Microsoft Certified: Data Analyst Associate, Tableau Desktop Specialist) is advantageous.
Experience :
• Minimum of 5 years' experience in business intelligence, data analytics, or related field, with at least 2 years in a managerial or team lead capacity.
• Experience working in the telecommunications, fintech, or financial services industry
• Proven experience working with senior management and executive stakeholders
• Experience using advanced SQL, BI tools, and data analytics platforms
• Track record of leading predictive analytics, customer analytics, and revenue optimization initiatives
Skills / physical competencies:
• Strategic Thinker, Problem Solver, Improvement Driver
• Results Achiever, Operationally Astute, Data-Driven Decision Maker
• Strong analytical and statistical skills
• Advanced SQL and database management
• Power BI, Tableau, or similar dashboarding platforms (would be a plus)
• Advanced Excel and data modeling
• Process automation and reporting optimization
• Telecom commercial performance analysis
• Project management and agile delivery
• Executive reporting and presentation skills
• Ability to communicate complex data insights at all levels
• Report writing and data storytelling
• Team management and people development
• Cross-functional stakeholder management
• Change management and continuous improvement
• Customer focused and commercially aware
• Attention to detail and quality orientation
• Stable work history and professional maturity

title: Digital Banking Operation Manager (Re-announced)
description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Operations Manager is responsible for overseeing the daily operational activities and ensuring the smooth functioning of key units within the Digital Banking Department. This includes Card Issuance and Management, Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution, Customer Service and Support, and Business & Operations. The role ensures efficient service delivery, operational excellence, compliance with regulatory requirements, and enhanced customer experience across all digital banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
Card Issuance and Management:
Supervise the end-to-end card issuance process including debit, credit, prepaid and instant AfPay, MasterCards & VISA.
Coordinate with vendors and internal stakeholders for timely card production, delivery, and stock management.
Ensure compliance with card security standards and central bank regulations.
Settlement, Refund & Dispute Resolution:
Oversee daily transaction settlement and reconciliation processes with networks such as MasterCard, Visa, and AfPay.
Manage refund processing and timely resolution of customer disputes and chargebacks.
Coordinate with Finance, IT, and external partners to ensure settlement accuracy and integrity.
Customer Service and Support:
Lead the digital banking support team to provide timely and effective responses to customer inquiries and issues.
Monitor service levels and continuously improve customer support processes.
Handle escalated cases and ensure a professional and solution-oriented response.
Coordinate with the marketing to effectively and efficiently advertise the digital banking products and services to attract customers and share accurate information about the AUB digital banking products and services in social medias and website.
Leads the call center team for timely support for the digital banking services and products.
Business and Operations:
Coordinate daily business operations of the Digital Banking Department.
Implement and monitor SOPs for all operational activities.
Liaise with internal departments (IT, Risk, Compliance, Finance, etc.) for issue resolution and service enhancements.
Track KPIs and generate performance reports for senior management.
Lead accruals booking and manage digital banking operation cost and expenses.
Cross-functional Responsibilities:
Work closely with the Digital Banking Technical Manager and Deputy Head of DBD to align operations with technical developments and strategic initiatives.
Support the rollout of new digital products and services.
Ensure readiness for audits, regulatory reviews, and compliance reporting.
Reporting and Documentation:
Maintain detailed technical documentation, architecture designs, and process flows for all managed systems.
Provide regular performance, risk, and incident reports to the Deputy Head and Head of DBD.

Job Requirements
Education:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, Finance or related field (Master’s preferred).
Experience:
Minimum of 5 years of experience in digital banking systems, with at least 2 years in a technical leadership role.
Technical Competencies:
Strong understanding of digital banking services, card operations, and payment systems.
Experience in settlement and dispute management.
Excellent problem-solving, leadership, and communication skills.
Familiarity with core banking systems and digital platforms.
Fluency in English and local languages (Dari/Pashto) is an advantage.
Knowledge of Core Banking Systems (CBS).
Other Skills:
Strong leadership and problem-solving abilities.
Excellent communication and coordination skills.
Fluency in English; knowledge of Dari and Pashto is an advantage.

title: Sourcing & Quotation Analyst
category: Procurement and logistics, Information Technology, Business Development, Sales, Supply Chain Management
description: Role Summary We are hiring a Sourcing & Quotation Analyst to join our remote team. This is a night shift role. Your shift starts at 5:00 PM Kabul time and runs for 8 hours, aligned with international business hours. Your day will revolve around three things: finding the right opportunities, sourcing the right items from the right vendors, and building clean quotations that win. You will spend most of your shift on calls and emails with international vendors, so strong English and confidence on the phone are non-negotiable. This role is for someone serious. Someone who wants to grow, works hard without being chased, and takes pride in getting the details right. If you are looking for a relaxed 9 to 5, this is not for you. If you want to build a real career and you are willing to put in the work, we want to talk to you. Duties and Responsibilities Opportunity Research Search online portals and platforms for new tenders, RFQs, and product opportunities. Read the requirements carefully and understand exactly what is being asked for. Shortlist the opportunities that fit and flag them to management. Item Sourcing Identify the correct manufacturers and authorized distributors for each item. Verify part numbers, specifications, and compliance requirements before reaching out. Find backup vendors for every key item so we are never stuck with a single source. Vendor Communication Call and email vendors during your shift to request quotes, confirm stock, lead times, and shipping terms. Ask sharp follow-up questions when a quote is incomplete or unclear. Follow up consistently until you have everything you need. No half-finished work. Quotation Preparation Organize vendor pricing in Excel or Google Sheets and compare properly. Build professional quotations using company templates. Triple check every number, SKU, quantity, and date before anything goes out. Coordination and Records Keep clean records of all vendor communication, quotes, and follow-ups. Update internal trackers and CRM tools daily. Work closely with management on final pricing and submission strategy. Never miss a deadline. Discipline and Work Ethic Log in on time. Every shift. Respond quickly on email, WhatsApp, and internal tools during your hours. Keep a professional tone in every vendor interaction. Own your work. No excuses, no shortcuts. Job Requirements Must-Have Fluent English. Spoken and written. You must be able to hold a clear, confident conversation on the phone with international vendors. This is not negotiable. Strong IT background. Comfortable with advanced Google search, Excel or Google Sheets (formulas, filters, sorting), email tools, cloud storage, and basic CRM systems. Sharp critical thinking. You can read a requirement, understand what is being asked, and spot gaps or risks in a vendor's quote. Night shift availability. Ready to work 5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time, Monday to Friday, without exception. Serious attention to detail. Numbers, SKUs, quantities, and dates must always be right. Discipline and work ethic. Self-driven, reliable, consistent. You do not need someone standing over you to get the work done. Confident on calls. Polite, professional, clear. No slang, no shortcuts. Hungry. You want to build something real and you are willing to put in the work to get there. Nice-to-Have Previous experience in procurement, sourcing, or supply chain. Exposure to international tenders or B2B quotation work. Experience with tender portals or sourcing platforms. Familiarity with Notion, ClickUp, Trello, or similar project management tools. Basic knowledge of IT hardware, industrial equipment, or logistics. Do Not Apply If You are looking for a 9 to 5. You cannot commit to the night shift. You need to be chased to finish work. Your English is weak and you plan to fake it on vendor calls. You cannot. Submission Guidelines Interested candidates should submit their updated CV along with a short introduction (2 to 3 paragraphs) explaining why they are a good fit for this role and confirming their availability for the night shift (5:00 PM to 1:00 AM Kabul time). Send applications to: procurement@vastglobelogistics.com Please write "Sourcing & Quotation Analyst Application" in the email subject line. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Applications without a proper introduction will not be considered.

title: System Administrator
description:
About UA Telecom
UA Telecom is a dynamic and rapidly expanding Internet Service Provider (ISP) in Afghanistan. with operations dating back to 2013. We deliver reliable, high-speed internet services nationwide, utilizing technologies such Wireless, Fiber Optic, Microwave, and VSAT Platforms. Our focus is on providing practical, efficient connectivity solutions tailored to the unique needs of businesses, organizations, and individuals. As we continue to expand, we are dedicated to making a tangible impact by creating local job opportunities and fostering long-term social development in Afghanistan.
For more information, visit www.uatelecom.af

Job Description
The System Administrator is responsible for the end-to-end management and security of the ISP’s core network infrastructures, including firewalls, routers, switches, and servers across multiple sites. This role supports customers by ensuring stable internet connectivity and reliable service through precise configuration, continuous monitoring, and rapid incident resolution. It also ensures maximum network uptime and peak performance across the infrastructure. Key responsibilities include managing link provisioning, bandwidth allocation, IP address management, and collaboration with upstream providers.
Key Responsibilities:
Network Infrastructure & Security
Install, configure, and maintain core routers, switches, and firewalls, ensuring scalability and adaptability to future growth.
Oversee the operation and firmware updates of primary and secondary firewalls across Main Office and Provincial sites, ensuring optimal performance and security.
Monitor spanning tree protocols on switches, ensuring data flows through primary point-to-point links and addressing any issues.
Protect CPE and PTP devices from external network attacks by blocking unauthorized ports and ensuring secure network access.
Identify customer bandwidth over-usage through weekly monitoring via Cacti servers, apply traffic shaping on CPE devices if limiters fail, and ensure no customer exceeds their contracted bandwidth.
2. Link & Bandwidth Management
Process link activations, upgrades, downgrades, and suspensions through CRM and coordination with the collections department, ensuring seamless integration with core firewall systems.
Administer the firewall system dedicated to hotspot users, generating new accounts and allocating bandwidth based on user requirements.
Record customers’ day and night bandwidth usage and update the records daily; monitor to prevent overload during peak hours, and request bandwidth upgrades for the main office and branches as needed.
Manage firewall time schedulers for day and night bandwidth allocations, optimizing network usage.
Oversee demo internet link connections, ensuring customer satisfaction during trial periods.
Administer customer requests for temporary bandwidth upgrades, ensuring seamless service delivery.
3. Server & System Maintenance
Conduct monthly HDD diagnostics on the primary server, ensuring data security and system health.
Maintain and update the Primary and Secondary Cacti servers to ensure better functionality and apply available updates.
Monitor UCRM server health and apply updates as they become available.
Monitor NTP server health, specifically for PTP, CPE, and the bandwidth scheduler.
Maintain EMCO server IP addresses and register new PTP and PTMP links for the alerting system in case of downtime.
4. IP & Device Management
Update IP allocation sheets for Main office and provincial branches, including devices license keys.
Monitor the locations of high-capacity devices and their connected base stations.
Maintain records of customers and sites’ equipment serial numbers for asset record.
5. Monitoring & Troubleshooting
Identify and resolve WAN, LAN, and WLAN issues promptly to maintain network stability.
Utilize Intermapper to assess microwave device capacities, ensuring no device is overloaded.
Update and monitor the WLAN virtualized Layer 2 map for new sector and switch installations, ensuring all PTP devices operate above 10 Mbps LAN speed by actively monitoring the alerting system.
Oversee the number of tickets created and closed by System/Helpdesk officers, ensuring timely and satisfactory resolution of technical issues.
6. Customer Support & Collaboration
Collaborate quarterly with the collections department to reconcile active customer bandwidth allocations, including day and night usage.
Provide online support to team members and customers for any technical-related issues, ensuring prompt resolution.
Upstream Coordination: Serve as the primary liaison with upstream providers to diagnose and resolve link issues promptly, staying engaged until full resolution to ensure uninterrupted service.
7. Compliance & Web Filtering
Continuously monitor web filter subnets and liaise with upstream providers to block URLs flagged by ATRA, ensuring permanent enforcement in full compliance with its official directives.
8. Additional Duties
Perform any other tasks as assigned by management to support network operations and service delivery.

Job Requirements
Required: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Network Engineering, or a related field. Preference will be given to candidates with a Master’s degree in a related major field.
With a Bachelor’s degree: minimum of 5 years’ experience in system or network administration; with a Master’s degree: minimum of 3 years, preferably within an ISP environment.
CCNA and CCNP certifications are highly preferred.
Strong hands-on experience with Cisco, MikroTik, and Ubiquiti (UBQT) devices.
Advanced knowledge of network protocols, including TCP/IP, BGP, OSPF, VLANs, and PPPoE.
Deep understanding of network security best practices and compliance with regulatory directives (e.g., ATRA).
Ability to analyze and resolve complex technical issues efficiently under pressure.
Excellent communication and reporting skills in Dari, Pashto, and English.

Submission Guideline
Interested candidates are encouraged to submit their applications by Jun 30, 2026 . To apply, please send your updated CV to vacancies@uatelecom.af
In the subject line of your email, please ensure to include the Vacancy Number and Desired Province. e.g: (UAT-VA-SA-2154-A - Kabul) .
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the written test or interview process.

Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.
Requires quick work execution, competent English skills, honesty and reliability, and extensive knowledge or connections in Baghlan Province.

Duties and Responsibilities
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

Job Requirements
Residing in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan; possessing basic English writing and communication skills; preference will be given to candidates with relevant government, military, or investigator experience; male candidates preferred

Please submit your English resume on this website. Name your resume with your name and occupation. The resume should include your phone number, education, and detailed work experience (specifying position, company name, and responsibilities). Please update your resume regularly. Company staff will contact you via email; please check your inbox.

title: Customer Service Agent - English Translator.
description: About Speenkai Speenkai is Afghanistan's first and leading BPO (Business Process Outsourcing) service company, specializing in providing comprehensive administrative and technical support to Afghan-owned companies abroad. Our mission is to empower Afghan entrepreneurs and businesses operating internationally by offering high-quality, reliable support services from our base in Afghanistan. With a team of skilled professionals, we help Afghan companies streamline their operations, enhance efficiency, and achieve success. Job Summary Night-Shift Job Are you a motivated, detail-oriented professional fluent in English, and ready to grow in a dynamic environment? Speenkai, Afghanistan's first BPO service company, and Bay Master Appliance Services LLC are looking to hire experienced individuals to join our full-time night shift team as Dispatchers/Customer Service Representatives. In this role, you will take inbound calls, set appointments for customers, and dispatch technicians efficiently. The ideal candidate will take charge of daily operations, including planning, scheduling, and managing the tech force. PLEASE DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ARE NOT FLUENT IN ENGLISH to save yourself time. If you have strong communication skills, thrive under pressure, and are passionate about delivering exceptional support, we want to hear from you! Duties & Responsibilities Duties & Responsibilities 1. Receive incoming calls from clients and setup service appointments. 2. Receive incoming calls from technicians throughout the shift. 3. Keep track of daily schedule and job status throughout work schedule. 4. Respond to open email requests and inquiries via email 5. Ability to enter tickets into the CRM Job Requirements Job Requirements · Fluent in English and must possess excellent verbal and written skills. • Motivated self-starter • Office work experience • Ability to multitask in fast paced environment is crucial. • Capable of typing 45+ words per minute necessary • Customer Service skills and Conflict Resolution skills. • Telemarketing experience is a plus • Microsoft Office Products Submission Guideline This link will redirect you to an online assessment. There a video question at the end. If you don not answer, you application will not be accepted. The assessment is around 50 minutes long. Find a quiet place and stable internet. Answers from Ai and cheating cold be identified and will ruin your chances to be considered. Click on the link below, enter your email, and the assessment will be sent to your email to start. Good Luck. https://app.testtrick.com/public-invitation/e885f319cea28b209c18006ed8106143-56e8c05f9ca1d33d4a0c544fc4c87568 Functional Area Sales/Marketing Management Administrative Translation Communication Operation Data Collection Data Entry OPERATIONS Countries Afghanistan Provinces Kabul Apply Now

title: Software Developer
description:
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology
About Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company
Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company is a trusted provider of IT solutions, software development, and digital transformation services in Afghanistan. Our mission is to empower businesses with innovative technology solutions that enhance efficiency, security, and scalability.
With a team of experienced professionals, we specialize in custom software development, enterprise solutions, cloud computing, and IT infrastructure services . We are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions that help organizations stay competitive in the digital world.
Our Services
Software Development: Custom web and mobile applications using Laravel, React, Next.js, and more.
Enterprise IT Solutions: ERP, MIS, CRM, and custom business software.
IT Consultancy: Digital strategy, system integration, and cybersecurity.
Cloud Solutions: AWS, DigitalOcean, Laravel Forge, and cloud-based deployments.
E-Commerce Development: Scalable online store solutions with secure payment gateways.
Why Choose Us?
Expert Team: Skilled professionals with expertise in software engineering and IT solutions.
Quality & Security: Industry-standard practices ensuring high-performance and secure applications.
Client-Focused Approach: Tailored solutions that align with business needs.
Reliable Support: Ongoing maintenance and technical support for seamless operations.
Our Vision
To be a leading technology service provider in Afghanistan, driving digital innovation and business growth.
Our Mission
To develop reliable, scalable, and high-performance technology solutions that help businesses streamline their operations and achieve success.
Job Summary

Job Descriptions
We are seeking a highly skilled Laravel Developer to join our dynamic team at Hushmand Shahar Information Technology Service Company . The ideal candidate will have strong expertise in Laravel, PHP, and modern web development technologies and will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining robust, scalable, and high-performance web applications.
This role requires a deep understanding of MVC architecture, database management, and front-end technologies . As a Laravel Developer, you will collaborate with cross-functional teams to build secure applications, integrate APIs, optimize performance , and troubleshoot technical challenges.

Job Requirements
Proven experience (2+ years) as a Laravel Developer or in a similar role.
Proficiency in PHP, Laravel, MySQL, and object-oriented programming (OOP) .
Strong knowledge of MVC architecture and best coding practices.
Experience in front-end technologies (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Vue.js, React, or Alpine.js).
Familiarity with Laravel Blade templating and Livewire (preferred but not mandatory).
Hands-on experience with RESTful API development and third-party API integration .
Understanding of security best practices , including data encryption and secure authentication.
Experience with queues, cron jobs, and background task processing in Laravel .
Knowledge of Git, GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab for version control .
Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills.
Familiarity with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban) .
Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work independently or within a team.

Submission Guidelines
Vacancy Number: Please mention the vacancy number in the email subject line .
CV & Previous Projects: Applicants must attach their CV and a list with links of previous projects they have worked on.
Email Submission: Send your application to hushmandshahar@gmail.com before the deadline.

Submission Email
hushmandshahar@gmail.com
Apply
